mapper.sql: t.id, t.user_id, t.lobster_id, t.task_name, t.message_content, t.schedule_type, t.cron_expr, t.execute_time, t.timezone, t.xxl_job_id, t.status, t.deleted, t.last_execute_time, t.last_execute_status, t.last_execute_msg, t.created_at, t.updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lobster_schedule_task ( user_id, lobster_id, task_name, message_content, schedule_type, cron_expr, execute_time, timezone, xxl_job_id, status, deleted, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{lobsterId}, #{taskName}, #{messageContent}, #{scheduleType}, #{cronExpr}, #{executeTime}, #{timezone}, #{xxlJobId}, #{status}, #{deleted}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM lobster_schedule_task AS t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE lobster_schedule_task SET lobster_id = #{lobsterId}, task_name = #{taskName}, message_content = #{messageContent}, schedule_type = #{scheduleType}, cron_expr = #{cronExpr}, execute_time = #{executeTime}, timezone = #{timezone}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE lobster_schedule_task SET xxl_job_id = #{xxlJobId}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE lobster_schedule_task SET last_execute_time = now(), last_execute_status = #{lastExecuteStatus}, last_execute_msg = #{lastExecuteMsg}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
